heading: MongoDB Search Field Types
body:
MongoDB Search doesn't support the following [BSON data types](manual/reference/bson-types):

- Decimal128

- JavaScript code with scope

- Max key

- Min key

- Regular Expression

- Timestamp

MongoDB Search automatically stores fields of type [string](bson-data-types-string) on `mongot`. You can store fields of all
supported [supported types](bson-data-chart) on MongoDB Search using the
[storedSource](fts-stored-source-definition) option in your index definition. To
learn more about `mongot` and MongoDB Search node architecture, see
[MongoDB Search Deployment Options](fts-deployment-options).

The following table enumerates the supported [BSON data types](manual/reference/bson-types) and the [supported](bson-data-types) that you can use to index the BSON (Binary Javascript Object Notation) data types.
The table also lists the [MongoDB Search operators](operators-ref)
that you can use to query the field values.

| BSON Type                  | MongoDB Search Field Type                  | Operators and Collectors                              |
| -------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| Array                      | booleandatenumberobjectIdstringtokenvector | Operators that support the data type in the array.    |
| Boolean                    | boolean                                    | equalsin                                              |
| Date                       | date                                       | equalsfacetinnearrange                                |
| Date                       | dateFacet                                  | facet                                                 |
| Double                     | number                                     | equalsinnearrange                                     |
| Double                     | numberFacet                                | facet                                                 |
| Double                     | knnVector                                  | knnBeta                                               |
| GeoJSON Object             | geo                                        | geoShapegeoWithinnear                                 |
| 32-bit integer             | number                                     | equalsinfacetnearrange                                |
| 32-bit integer             | numberFacet                                | facet                                                 |
| 64-bit integer             | number                                     | equalsfacetinnearrange                                |
| 64-bit integer             | numberFacet                                | facet                                                 |
| Null                       | N/A                                        | equals                                                |
| Object                     | document                                   | Operators that support the field types in the object. |
| Object                     | embeddedDocument (for array of objects)    | embeddedDocumenthasAncestorhasRoot                    |
| ObjectId                   | objectId                                   | equalsinrange                                         |
| String                     | string                                     | moreLikeThis phrasequeryString regexspantextwildcard  |
| String                     | stringFacet                                | facet                                                 |
| String                     | autocomplete                               | autocomplete                                          |
| String                     | token                                      | equalsfacetinrange                                    |
| UUID/BSON Binary Subtype 4 | uuid                                       | equalsin                                              |
| Vector                     | vector                                     | vectorSearch                                          |

asterisk These operators do not support an array of strings.

cog MongoDB Search doesn't include a field type for indexing null values because MongoDB Search automatically indexes null values for both statically and dynamically indexed fields.

sun Deprecated. To learn more about the deprecated facet field types and their updated counterparts, see [Comparing Field Types for Facet](fts-facet-type-differences).

star Array of `double` or `int` values.

> **Note:** You can store fields of all supported [supported types](bson-data-chart) on MongoDB Search using the `storedSource` [option](index-definition-options).
